purpose: replace rejected mantlet/barrel block with a Meshy-generated low-poly barrel-only asset
target: barrel tube only; no mantlet or turret housing

pivot_contract.local_axis: barrel length should align to local forward axis after import normalization
pivot_contract.pivot: runtime pivot belongs at rear/breech end, parented under turret or mantlet socket
pivot_contract.note: do not require Meshy to solve turret compatibility; barrel is a separate low-poly visual tube
